message.content:
@startuml
actor Nurse
participant ": RecordAdverseReactionUI" as UI
participant ": RecordAdverseReactionController" as Controller
database ": Company\n: AdverseReactionStore" as Store
object ": WaitingRoomStore" as WRS
entity "ref SD_AdverseRea\ntionMapper_toDTO" as MapperRef #lightgray
control ": AdverseReactionDTO" as DTO
boundary ": AdverseReactionMapper" as ARMapper
rectangle {
    object :WaitingRoomStore
} 
Nurse -> UI: 1 Starts recording adverse reaction
activate UI
UI --> Nurse: 2 asks for data(SNS Number, Adverse Reaction Text)
deactivate UI
Nurse -> UI: 3 types requested data
activate UI
UI -> Controller: 4 createAdverseReaction(SNSNumber, advReact)
activate Controller
note right of Controller
5 wstore = getWaitingRoomStore()
6 store = getRecordAdverseReactionStore()
7 snsu = getSNSUserInTheWaitingRoomByItsSNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
8 vc = getVaccinationCenterBySNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
9 ar = createAdverseReaction(snsu, advReact, vc)
end note
WRS <- Controller: SNS User in waiting room by number
ARMapper <-- Controller: Vaccination Center By SNUMBER
create participant ArObject
ArObject <.. Controller: Create Adverse Reaction Object
controller --x controller: validateAdverseReaction(ar)
dto <- controller: toDto(Ar)
mapperRef -[hidden] dto
dto ..> mapperRef
arDto <- controller: return adrsedto
ui <- controller: show user corresponding to snumber and wait approval confirmation from nurse
nurse -> ui: confirm action
ui -> controller: saveadversereaction()
controller -> store: Save adversereaction(arsd)
store -->> store: Validate arsD
store -->> store: addArsD(adrsd)
ui <- controller: inform operation success
@enduml
